info.title: Tailwind2Xaml
info.description: Convert Tailwind OKLCH theme files to XAML ResourceDictionary.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: Tailwind2Xaml - Tailwind OKLCH theme to XAML ResourceDictionary converter

options.name: --help
options.description: Show this help message and exit.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Target XAML framework. Options: maui (default), wpf, uwp, uno, avalonia.
Example:
dotnet tailwind2xaml theme.txt MyColors.xaml

arguments.name: INPUTFILE
arguments.description: Required. Path to Tailwind theme file with color definitions.

arguments.name: OUTPUTFILE
arguments.description: Optional. Path for the generated XAML file. Defaults to 'Colors.xaml' in input file's directory.
